import source


def test_source_module_imports():
    assert source is not None


def test_knapsack_exact_capacity():
    """Test that knapsack includes items that exactly fill remaining capacity."""
    capacity = 3
    items = [(3, 10), (1, 5)]
    # The optimal solution should take the first item for total value 10.
    assert source.knapsack(capacity, items) == 10
